Package index

Setup & Colors

Prepare objects and manage color palettes

GenerateDirectories()
Create a standard project directory tree
PrepObject()
Prepare a Seurat Object for Uniform Downstream Analysis
ShowColors()
Display All Stored Color Assignments
GetColors()
Retrieve Stored Color Vectors from a Prepared Seurat Object
SelectColors()
Generate a named color vector from a variable
SetLevels()
Relevel a factor or vector concisely
RenameClusters()
Rename numeric cluster IDs to prefixed labels
NumberLabels()
Prepend or append sequential numbers to factor levels
SummarizeMetadata()
Summarize cell-level metadata to donor / patient level
PlotMetaSummary()
Faceted bar chart summarizing metadata distributions across patients
Nour_pal()
Return an interpolated scSidekick color palette function
Nour_cols()
Access colors from the Nour18 palette by name
Nour_cols20()
Access colors from the Nour20 palette by name
Nour18
Nour18 color palette
Nour20
Nour20 full-spectrum color palette
Nour_palettes
Named list of scSidekick color palettes
scale_color_Nour()
ggplot2 color scale using scSidekick palettes
scale_fill_Nour()
ggplot2 fill scale using scSidekick palettes

Dimensionality Reduction

Dimension selection helpers

Determine_nDims()
Determine the optimal number of dimensions for downstream analysis

UMAP & Composition

Visualize dimensionality reductions and cell-type composition trends

PlotDimPlots() PlotGridUMAP() PlotTrendAndUMAP()
UMAP grid with optional composition trend panel
PlotTrendLabeled()
Labeled stacked composition trend plot
PlotComposition()
Cell Composition Bar Charts
PlotPieUMAP()
UMAP with Pie Charts at Cluster Centroids
PlotAlluvial()
Parallel Sets (Alluvial) Plot
PlotRose()
Rose (Polar Bar) Composition Chart
PlotChord()
Chord Diagram Between Two Categorical Variables
PlotAtlasWheel()
Dataset Overview Wheel

Feature Expression

Gene expression overlay on embeddings

PlotFeature()
Violin / box / bar plots for gene expression and numeric metadata
PlotPseudoBulk()
Pseudobulk box + dot plots for gene expression
ComputePseudobulk()
Compute pseudobulk (donor-level mean) expression
GenerateFeatureMaps() PlotFeaturePlots()
Batch single-cell feature plots with shared color limits
PlotMultiFeature()
Plot multiple features on a single embedding

Heatmaps & Dot Plots

Group-level expression summaries

GroupHeatmap()
Group-Level Expression Heatmap with Optional Dot Overlay
SplitDotPlot()
Dot plot split by a metadata variable with numbered group labels
SplitDotPlot2()
Dot plot with both group and gene-axis hierarchical clustering
FastDotPlot()
Fast dot plot with regex gene selection and k-group gene clustering
FastDotPlot2()
FastDotPlot with optional EnrichR enrichment header
StackedVlnPlot()
Stacked Violin Plot for Multiple Features
CorrelateGene()
Correlate one gene against all others within each cell type
SplitByGene()
Split cells into expression groups per cell type
PlotCorrelation()
Volcano plots of CorrelateGene results

Copy Number Variation

inferCNV and CopyKAT wrappers for CNV inference from scRNA-seq

RunInferCNV()
Run inferCNV copy-number inference
RunCopyKAT()
Run CopyKAT copy-number inference

Feature Annotation

Annotate genes with genomic coordinates, biotype, and Ensembl IDs; filter by chromosome, biotype, or pattern

AnnotateFeatures()
Annotate Seurat features with genomic metadata
GetFeatures()
Filter features by genomic annotation
GetGeneOrder()
Get genomically-ordered gene position table
ClearAnnotationCache()
Clear the local feature annotation cache

Marker Discovery

Fast per-cluster Wilcoxon rank-sum tests compatible with BPCells and Seurat v5

RunWilcoxAUC()
Fast Wilcoxon Rank-Sum + AUC Marker Test (BPCells / Seurat-v5 Compatible)

Differential Expression

Volcano plots, enrichment visualization, leading edge

PlotVolcano()
Volcano Plot of Differential Expression Results
PlotEnrichment()
Over-Representation Analysis Visualization
PlotGSEAEnrichment()
GSEA Running Score Mountain Plots - Direct or from RunGSEA Output Directory
VisualizeLeadingEdge()
Visualize Leading-Edge Genes from GSEA Results

Cell Annotation

Automated cell-type assignment

AssignCellTypes()
Assign cell-type labels from a cluster map
CellTypeAssignmentHelper()
Automated cell-type annotation with rcellmarker, scType, and SingleR

Spatial Transcriptomics

Visualize spatial gene expression and cell-type distributions

GenerateSpatialDimMaps() PlotSpatialDimPlots()
Batch spatial dimensionality-reduction (cell-type) plots
GenerateSpatialFeatureMaps() PlotSpatialFeaturePlots()
Batch spatial feature plots for genes and/or metadata columns
GenerateMasterGeneMaps() PlotMasterMaps()
4-column master gene map: UMAP clusters + UMAP expression + Spatial clusters + Spatial expression

Upstream Regulator Analysis

TF activity inference via decoupleR + CollecTRI

RunURA()
Upstream Regulator Analysis via decoupleR + CollecTRI

Pathway Analysis

GSEA and gene set enrichment

RunGSEA()
Run GSEA pathway analysis on a Seurat object
RunGSEA_pseudobulk()
Pseudobulk GSEA with limma contrasts and per-patient ssGSEA
RunSCssGSEA()
Single-cell ssGSEA with significance testing and heatmap visualization
RunEnrichment()
Run Over-Representation Analysis and Plot Results
PlotPathwayButterfly()
Pathway state hierarchy butterfly plot

Gene Expression Programs

Consensus NMF (cNMF) program discovery via reticulate

RunCNMF()
Run consensus NMF (cNMF) to discover gene expression programs
GetCNMFPrograms()
Extract cNMF consensus programs for a chosen K
GetCNMFTopGenes()
Top genes per cNMF program

Cell-Cell Communication

CellChat pipeline wrappers

RunCellChat()
Run the full CellChat analysis pipeline per group
CompareCellChat()
Compare CellChat objects across groups for all shared pathways
RankCellChatPathways()
Rank and visualize differentially active CellChat pathways across conditions
RenameCellTypeInCC()
Rename a cell type label inside a CellChat object without re-running analysis

Survival Analysis

Kaplan-Meier survival analysis for TCGA and custom bulk expression cohorts

LoadTCGA()
Download and cache a TCGA or TARGET expression dataset
EnrichTCGAMeta()
Enrich TCGA metadata with GDC clinical and molecular subtype columns
SurvMetaSummary()
Summarise clinical metadata for survival analysis
SurvPlot()
Kaplan-Meier survival plots for bulk expression data

Quality Control

QC metrics, data loading, and sample validation

PlotQCMetrics()
Compute QC metrics and generate pre-filtration QC plots
LoadSamplesRNA()
Load, QC, and merge 10X scRNA-seq samples
CheckSex()
Verify sample sex annotation using sex-specific gene expression
FilterGenesByPct()
Filter genes by percent expression across groups
PlotPctHeatmap()
Heatmap of per-group gene expression percentages

Reporting & Utilities

Methods text, PPTX builder, theme, and session tools

ChartBuilder()
Open the Chart Builder app pre-loaded with an R data frame
ExtractMethods()
Extract analysis parameters and generate a methods text from a Seurat object
InspectPlot()
Inspect a ggplot2 object and describe what it shows
create_analysis_pptx()
Build a PowerPoint summary from an analysis output folder
log_analysis_params()
Log Seurat analysis parameters to a JSON file
log_figure_legend()
Manually log a figure legend for a saved PDF
theme_NourMin()
scSidekick minimal ggplot2 theme
roundUpNice()
Round a number up to the next "nice" value

Session Logger

Passive R session logging and summarization

start_session_logger()
Start the scSidekick passive session logger
summarize_r_session()
Summarize an R session log
logger_log_file()
Return the current session log file path
logger_plot_dir()
Return the current session plot directory

On this page

Developed by Nourhan Abdelfattah.

Site built with pkgdown 2.1.3.
